items.definition_en: A desk is a piece of furniture you use to work.
items.example_en: She keeps her computer on her desk.

items.definition_en: A chair is a seat for one person.
items.example_en: He sat on his chair to write.

items.definition_en: A table is a flat surface with legs for working or eating.
items.example_en: They put the books on the table.

items.definition_en: A cabinet is a piece of furniture with doors for storing things.
items.example_en: The keys are in the cabinet.

items.definition_en: A bookshelf is a piece of furniture for holding books.
items.example_en: The report is on the bookshelf.

items.definition_en: A sofa is a long, comfortable seat for several people.
items.example_en: They talked while sitting on the sofa.

items.definition_en: A couch is a soft piece of furniture to sit or lie on.
items.example_en: He relaxed on the couch after lunch.

items.definition_en: A cupboard is a piece of furniture with shelves for storing things.
items.example_en: I keep the cups in the cupboard.

items.definition_en: A wardrobe is a tall piece of furniture for hanging clothes.
items.example_en: She put her jacket in the wardrobe.

items.definition_en: A drawer is a box in a desk or table that you pull out.
items.example_en: Pens are kept in this drawer.

items.definition_en: A file cabinet is a piece of furniture for storing files.
items.example_en: The contracts are in the file cabinet.

items.definition_en: A stool is a seat with no back or arms.
items.example_en: He sat on a stool at the counter.

items.definition_en: An armchair is a soft chair with supports for your arms.
items.example_en: She read a book in the armchair.

items.definition_en: A bench is a long seat for several people.
items.example_en: They waited on the bench outside.

items.definition_en: A meeting table is a large table used during group discussions.
items.example_en: We gather around the meeting table every Monday.

items.definition_en: A reception desk is a desk where visitors are welcomed.
items.example_en: She greeted guests at the reception desk.

items.definition_en: A locker is a small cupboard that locks for keeping things safe.
items.example_en: He put his bag in the locker.

items.definition_en: An office divider is a screen that separates workspaces.
items.example_en: They put up an office divider for more privacy.

items.definition_en: A bookcase is a set of shelves for keeping books.
items.example_en: The office bookcase is full of files.

items.definition_en: A coffee table is a small table in front of a sofa.
items.example_en: The coffee table holds magazines and tea.
